Title: Registrazione utente
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page
2. Enter the email, password, name, and surname
3. Click on the "Register" button
Expected Result: The user is successfully registered and can log in

Title: Accesso utente
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page
2. Enter the email and password
3. Click on the "Login" button
Expected Result: The user is successfully logged in

Title: Inserimento serra
Test Data: Valid greenhouse name, location, size, and type
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the add greenhouse page
2. Enter the greenhouse name, location, size, and type
3. Click on the "Add" button
Expected Result: The greenhouse is successfully added to the list

Title: Rimozione serre
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the greenhouse page
2. Select the greenhouse to be removed
3. Click on the "Remove" button
Expected Result: The selected greenhouse is successfully removed from the list

Title: Modifica impostazioni
Test Data: Valid greenhouse to be modified, new name, location, size, and type
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the greenhouse page
2. Select the greenhouse to be modified
3. Click on the "Edit" button
4. Enter the new name, location, size, and type
5. Click on the "Save" button
Expected Result: The selected greenhouse is successfully modified with the new details

Title: User Registration
Preconditions: The app is installed on the device and the device is connected to the internet.
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Click on the "Register" button.
3. Enter the username, email, and password.
4. Click on the "Register" button.
Expected Result: The user is registered in the system.

Title: User Access
Preconditions: The app is installed on the device and the device is connected to the internet.
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Click on the "Login" button.
3. Enter the email and password.
4. Click on the "Login" button.
Expected Result: The user accesses their profile and can use all the features of the application.

Title: Modify Greenhouse Settings
Preconditions:
User has logged in
Device is connected to the internet
Greenhouse is connected to the user
Test Data:
Greenhouse ID: 1
New Temperature Limit: 25
New Humidity Limit: 60
New Soil Humidity Limit: 50
New Light Limit: 1000
New Greenhouse Name: "My Greenhouse"
Test Steps:
1. Log in to the system.
2. Navigate to the Greenhouse Settings page.
3. Select the greenhouse to modify.
4. Enter the new temperature limit.
5. Enter the new humidity limit.
6. Enter the new soil humidity limit.
7. Enter the new light limit.
8. Enter a new name for the greenhouse.
9. Click the "Save" button.
Expected Result: The greenhouse settings are updated with the new values and the greenhouse name.

Title: User Registration
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page.
2. Enter the required user details (Username, Email, Password).
3. Click the "Register" button.
Expected Result: The user account is created successfully.

Title: User Login
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter the username and password.
3. Click the "Login" button.
Expected Result: The user is logged in successfully.

Title: Greenhouse Visualization
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the greenhouse dashboard.
2. Verify that the greenhouses associated with the logged-in user are displayed.
Expected Result: The greenhouses are displayed correctly.

Title: Anomaly Notification
Test Steps:
1. Monitor the greenhouse conditions.
2. If an anomaly is detected, verify that a notification is sent to the user's device.
Expected Result: The user receives a notification about the anomaly.

Title: Weather Visualization
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the weather dashboard.
2. Verify that the current weather conditions for the user's location are displayed.
Expected Result: The current weather conditions are displayed correctly.

Title: Add Greenhouse
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Greenhouse Management section
2. Click on the "Add Greenhouse" button
3. Enter the title, description, and ID for the new greenhouse
4. Click on the "Save" button
Expected Result: The new greenhouse is added to the user's account and is associated with the user.

Title: Remove Greenhouse
Preconditions: User is logged in and has at least one greenhouse
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Greenhouse Management section
2. Select the greenhouse to be removed
3. Click on the "Remove" button
Expected Result: The selected greenhouse is removed from the user's account.

Title: Modify Greenhouse Settings
Preconditions: User is logged in and has at least one greenhouse
Test Data: New limits for alerts and a new name for the greenhouse
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Greenhouse Management section
2. Select the greenhouse to be modified
3. Change the alert limits and the name of the greenhouse
4. Click on the "Save" button
Expected Result: The greenhouse's settings are updated with the new limits and name.

Title: View Last Data
Preconditions: User is logged in and has at least one greenhouse
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Greenhouse Management section
2. Select the greenhouse to view data for
3. Click on the "View Last Data" button
Expected Result: The last data collected from the selected greenhouse is displayed.

Title: View Graphs
Preconditions: User is logged in and has at least one greenhouse
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Greenhouse Management section
2. Select the greenhouse to view graphs for
3. Click on the "View Graphs" button
Expected Result: The historical data collected from the selected greenhouse is displayed in graph form.

Title: Hardware Management
Preconditions: User is logged in and has at least one greenhouse
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Greenhouse Management section
2. Select the greenhouse to manage hardware for
3. Activate/deactivate the irrigation and lighting systems
Expected Result: The irrigation and lighting systems for the selected greenhouse are activated/deactivated.

Title: Modify User Profile
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user profile section
2. Click on the "Edit" button
3. Update the user's personal data
4. Click on the "Save" button
Expected Result: The user's personal data is updated and saved.

Title: Compatibility with Android 8.1 or later
Test Steps: 1. Install the application on a device with Android 8.1 or later
Expected Result: The application is successfully installed and runs without errors.

Title: Scalability
Test Steps:
1. Add multiple greenhouses to the application
2. Verify that the application remains responsive and performs well
Expected Result: The application remains responsive and performs well with multiple greenhouses added.

Title: Clean and Intuitive Graphics
Test Steps:
1. Navigate through the application
2. Verify that the graphics are clean and intuitive
Expected Result: The graphics are clean and intuitive, making it easy for the user to navigate the application.

Title: View Last Statistics of Selected Greenhouse
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the greenhouse statistics section
2. Verify that the last statistics of the selected greenhouse are displayed
Expected Result: The last statistics of the selected greenhouse are displayed.

Title: Maintain a Clean and Intuitive Interface
Test Steps:
1. Navigate through the application
2. Verify that the interface is clean and intuitive
Expected Result: The interface is clean and intuitive, making it easy for the user to navigate the application.

Title: Internationalization of the Application
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Navigate to the settings menu.
3. Change the language to a language other than the default language.
4. Close the settings menu.
Expected Result: The application interface should be displayed in the selected language.

Title: Deliverables Deadline Respect
Test Steps: 1. Check if the deliverables are delivered on time.
Expected Result: The deliverables should be delivered on time.

Title: Knowledge of Java for Android Development
Test Steps: 1. Check if the development team has knowledge of Java for Android development.
Expected Result: The development team should have knowledge of Java for Android development.

Title: Firebase Database Management
Test Steps: 1. Check if the development team can create and manage a Firebase database.
Expected Result: The development team should be able to create and manage a Firebase database.

Title: Internet Connection Requirement
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Check if the application can access the internet.
Expected Result: The application should be able to access the internet.

Title: Metrics of Non-Functional Requirements
Test Steps: 1. Check if the non-functional requirements have a metric for evaluation.
Expected Result: The non-functional requirements should have a metric for evaluation.

Title: User Registration
Preconditions: The system is installed on the user's device.
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Click on the "Register" button.
3. Enter the required personal information.
4. Click on the "Submit" button.
Expected Result: The user's account is created and stored in the database.

Title: User Login
Preconditions: The user's account is created and stored in the database.
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Click on the "Login" button.
3. Enter the email and password.
4. Click on the "Submit" button.
Expected Result: The user is logged in and can access their personal greenhouses.

Title: Modify personal data
Preconditions:
The system should already contain the user's account
The user should be registered correctly and have successfully logged in
Test Steps:
1. Log in to the system with the user's credentials
2. Navigate to the user's private area
3. Modify the user's personal data
4. Save the changes
Expected Result:
The user's account contains the modifications made by the user
The database contains the modified user account

Title: Verify account modification
Preconditions:
The system should already contain the user's account
The user should be registered correctly and have successfully logged in
Test Steps:
1. Log in to the system with the user's credentials
2. Navigate to the user's private area
3. Verify that the user's personal data has been modified according to the changes made
Expected Result: The user's account contains the modifications made by the user

Title: Verify database modification
Preconditions:
The system should already contain the user's account
The user should be registered correctly and have successfully logged in
Test Steps:
1. Log in to the system with the user's credentials
2. Query the database to retrieve the user's account
3. Verify that the user's personal data has been modified according to the changes made
Expected Result: The database contains the modified user account

Title: Verify account modification in traceability table
Preconditions:
The system should already contain the user's account
The user should be registered correctly and have successfully logged in
Test Steps:
1. Log in to the system with the user's credentials
2. Query the traceability table to retrieve the user's account modification history
3. Verify that the user's personal data modification is present in the history
Expected Result: The traceability table contains the user's personal data modification
